retry_reason: On EDEADLK the caller should retry after handling the deadlock; on other errors retry may be appropriate if transient.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is dma_resv lock acquisition with ww context, not reference-count management. The refcount increment (i915_gem_object_get) is incidental to the lock operation, occurring only on certain paths.
judge.retry_reason: On EDEADLK the caller should retry after handling the deadlock; on other errors retry may be appropriate if transient.

final.retry_reason: On EDEADLK the caller should retry after handling the deadlock; on other errors retry may be appropriate if transient.
